text: Section 1: Photosynthesis is how plants cook food. They use sunlight, water, and chlorophyll. Leaves act as the kitchen.
Section 2: Gravity is the invisible pull of the Earth. Newton saw an apple fall and discovered gravity.
Section 3: Fractions represent parts of a whole. Half is 1/2, quarter is 1/4. Denominators are the bottom numbers.
Section 4: Food chains represent energy transfer. Plants are producers, grasshoppers are primary consumers.
Section 5: Wrestling is a popular sport in Haryana villages. Matches are held in clay arenas called Akhadas.
